risks.title: AST parsing performance on large codebases
risks.mitigation: Implement caching and incremental parsing; profile early in Phase 2

risks.title: Unified-registry.json schema drift
risks.mitigation: Validate against schema before writes; add integration test

risks.title: LLM API rate limits during enrichment
risks.mitigation: Implement batching and exponential backoff; make LLM optional

candidates: src/populate.ts - main entry point for semantic generation
src/cli.ts - CLI flags and argument handling

decision_records.rationale: Allows offline operation and reduces dependencies on external services
decision_records.impact: Slightly reduced intelligence without LLM, but more resilient
